focusedDiff: +/* Task 26 is compile-selected so disabled control builds retain the exact
+ * existing stage executor and linked layout. */
-/* Mode-9 Dream Land owner input. The adapter owns these pointers only for the
- * synchronous preflight call; the renderer copies every value needed by the
- * eight later display-link commits before reporting success. */
+/* Mode-9 Dream Land owner input. Preflight consumes all fields synchronously,
+ * but successful execution retains binding_composed through the eight later
+ * display-link commits; the adapter workspace must remain live until finish. */
throw 'RendererM3Phase0Profile requires fast-run mode 9 and renderer profile 1.'
+    throw 'NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable=1 requires fast-run mode 9 and renderer profile 1.'
throw 'RendererScreenSpaceCensusMode requires fast-run mode 9 and renderer profile 1.'

-    -Label "battle_playable fast raw mode $FastRunMode static texture AOT $StaticTextureAotMode strict texture fence $([int]$RequireZeroPostGoTextureFence.IsPresent) frozen water $StaticTextureAotMode hybrid OAM $IFCommonHybridOamMode Fox CPU $FoxCpuMode wallpaper incremental $WallpaperIncrementalMode task20 startup stack census $([int]$Task20StackProfile.IsPresent) task22 run census $([int]$Task22WallpaperRunLab.IsPresent) phase matrix $([int]$PhaseMatrixMode.IsPresent) lower text HUD $LowerTextHudMode screen census $RendererScreenSpaceCensusMode economy $RenderEconomyMode/$RenderEconomyOwnerMask task9 float census/ITCM/phase2 $Task9FloatCensusMode/$Task9FloatItcmMode/$Task9FloatPhase2Mode task16 compare/i2f/addsub $Task16FloatCompareMode/$Task16FloatI2fMode/$Task16FloatAddSubMode" `

+    -Label "battle_playable fast raw mode $FastRunMode generated segment0 $NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable static texture AOT $StaticTextureAotMode strict texture fence $([int]$RequireZeroPostGoTextureFence.IsPresent) frozen water $StaticTextureAotMode hybrid OAM $IFCommonHybridOamMode Fox CPU $FoxCpuMode wallpaper incremental $WallpaperIncrementalMode task20 startup stack census $([int]$Task20StackProfile.IsPresent) task22 run census $([int]$Task22WallpaperRunLab.IsPresent) phase matrix $([int]$PhaseMatrixMode.IsPresent) lower text HUD $LowerTextHudMode screen census $RendererScreenSpaceCensusMode economy $RenderEconomyMode/$RenderEconomyOwnerMask task9 float census/ITCM/phase2 $Task9FloatCensusMode/$Task9FloatItcmMode/$Task9FloatPhase2Mode task16 compare/i2f/addsub $Task16FloatCompareMode/$Task16FloatI2fMode/$Task16FloatAddSubMode" `
-HarnessSelectMessage 'Fast raw benchmark did not select Pupupu VSBattle from Maps.'
+    throw 'FGM completed-channel reuse no longer retires an exact stale owner while failing closed on inconsistent ownership.'
Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDERER_HW_TRIANGLES ?= 0')) 'Makefile hardware renderer flag default is missing.'
Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL ?= 2')) 'Makefile renderer profile default is not forensic-safe.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE `$(NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE=$(NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE)')) 'M3 Phase-0 profiler is not default-off or omitted from build/benchmark identity.'

+Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE `$(NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE=$(NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE)')) 'Task 26 generated segment-0 selector is not default-off or included in build/benchmark identity.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB `$(NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB=$(NDS_TASK22_WALLPAPER_RUN_LAB)')) 'Task 22 wallpaper run lab is not compile-gated, default-off, or included in benchmark identity.'

Assert-True ($makefile.Contains('NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE ?= 0') -and $makefile.Contains("echo '#define NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE `$(NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE)';") -and $makefile.Contains('BENCH_MAKE_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE=$(NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE)')) 'Task 20 stack profiler is not compile-gated, default-off, or included in benchmark identity.'

Assert-True ($task20CoroutineArm.Contains('.section .text.ndsCoroutineTask20StackProfile') -and $task20Coroutine -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*extern uintptr_t ndsCoroutineReadSp.*?portCoroutineMainStackTop\(void\).*?#endif' -and $task20Os -match '(?s)#if NDS_TASK20_STACK_PROFILE\s*volatile u32 gNdsTask20GameplayStackBase;.*?volatile u32 gNdsTask20SampleRequest = 1u;.*?if \(\(gNdsTask20SampleRequest == 0u\) && \(finished == FALSE\)\) return;.*?#endif') 'Task 20 stack profiler leaks into normal text/data or scans without its one startup/final request.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-coarse-cpu-prep-no-gx-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL := 1.*?override NDS_RENDERER_BENCHMARK_MODE := 2') 'CPU_PREP_NO_GX cost-floor target is not a dedicated profile-1 build.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-coarse-warm-no-upload-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL := 1.*?override NDS_RENDERER_BENCHMARK_MODE := 4') 'WARM_NO_UPLOAD cost-floor target is not a dedicated profile-1 build.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-hwtri\).*?override NDS_DEV_SCENE_HARNESS := battle_playable_realtime.*?override NDS_DEV_LIVE_INPUT_PREVIEW := 1.*?override NDS_HARNESS_FAST_LOGIC := 0.*?override NDS_RENDERER_HW_TRIANGLES := 1.*?override NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL := 0') 'Published battle renderer no longer forces the complete realtime hardware profile.'

-Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_FAST_RUN_DEFAULT := 9.*?override NDS_SCENE_MIP_CACHE_LAB := 0.*?override NDS_RENDERER_BATTLE_STATIC_TEXTURE_DEFAULT := 1.*?override NDS_IFCOMMON_HYBRID_OAM := 0') 'Published battle renderer no longer boots the M3 complete-stage owner with pre-GO static residency, mixed IFCommon OAM/source-alpha ownership, and the retired mip-cache path disabled.'

+Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_FAST_RUN_DEFAULT := 9.*?override NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE := 1.*?override NDS_SCENE_MIP_CACHE_LAB := 0.*?override NDS_RENDERER_BATTLE_STATIC_TEXTURE_DEFAULT := 1.*?override NDS_IFCOMMON_HYBRID_OAM := 0') 'Published battle renderer no longer boots the retained generated M3 segment, complete-stage owner, pre-GO static residency, mixed IFCommon OAM/source-alpha ownership, and disabled mip-cache path.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-hwtri\).*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_COMPARE := 1.*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_I2F := 1.*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_ADDSUB := 1.*?endif' -and $makefile -match '(?s)NDS_FREEZE_DIAGNOSTIC_TARGETS :=.*?ifneq \(\$\(filter \$\(TARGET\),\$\(NDS_FREEZE_DIAGNOSTIC_TARGETS\)\),\).*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_COMPARE := 1.*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_I2F := 1.*?override NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_ADDSUB := 1.*?override NDS_FREEZE_DIAGNOSTICS') 'Published and release-equivalent diagnostic battle targets no longer ship all three SUPREME-qualified Task 16 float helpers.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-coarse-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL := 1') 'Internal coarse renderer target is not forced to profile 1.'

Assert-True ($makefile -match '(?s)ifeq \(\$\(TARGET\),smash64ds-battle-playable-forensic-hwtri\).*?override NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_LEVEL := 2') 'Internal forensic renderer target is not forced to profile 2.'

Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('$usesIntrinsicTask16FloatHelpers = $Target -in @(') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("'smash64ds-battle-playable-hwtri'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("'smash64ds-battle-playable-freeze-diagnostics-on-hwtri'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("'smash64ds-battle-playable-freeze-diagnostics-off-hwtri'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_COMPARE=$effectiveTask16FloatCompareMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_I2F=$effectiveTask16FloatI2fMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('NDS_TASK16_FLOAT_ADDSUB=$effectiveTask16FloatAddSubMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('-Task16CompareMode $effectiveTask16FloatCompareMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('-Task16I2fMode $effectiveTask16FloatI2fMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('-Task16AddSubMode $effectiveTask16FloatAddSubMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('task16FloatCompareMode = $effectiveTask16FloatCompareMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('task16FloatI2fMode = $effectiveTask16FloatI2fMode') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('task16FloatAddSubMode = $effectiveTask16FloatAddSubMode')) 'Canonical owner verifier no longer derives and consistently validates intrinsic Task 16 1/1/1 publication while preserving custom lab controls.'

Assert-True (-not $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('[switch]$NoBuild') -and -not $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('[switch]$CompareOnly') -and -not $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('-NoBuild:$NoBuild') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('($case.Data.build -cne $case.Build)') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('(Get-FileHash $elf -Algorithm SHA256).Hash') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('(Get-FileHash $rom -Algorithm SHA256).Hash') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('($a[0] -ne $index) -or ($b[0] -ne $index)') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('($a[3] -le 0) -or ($b[3] -le 0)') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('($a[4] -le 0) -or ($b[4] -le 0)') -and $task16CombinedVerifier.Contains('($a[5] -ne 0) -or ($b[5] -ne 0)')) 'Task 16 combined SUPREME gate can bypass fresh builds or omit build/ROM/ELF/full-row identity.'
Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('RENDER_PROFILE_LEVEL=%u')) 'Realtime verifier does not identify the compiled renderer profile.'

Assert-True ($rendererBenchmarkWrapper.Contains("'builds/build-m3-phase0-lab'") -and $rendererBenchmarkWrapper.Contains('-RendererM3Phase0Profile:$RendererM3Phase0Profile')) 'M3 Phase-0 benchmark is not isolated in its dedicated lab build.'

Assert-True ($rendererVerifier -match '(?s)if \(\$fastIterationUnarmedM4 -and\s*\(\$effectiveStaticTextureAotMode -eq 1\)\).*?Fast iteration did not leave the deliberately unarmed TEXEL0/TEXEL1 path idle') 'Realtime verifier incorrectly requires an idle TEXEL0/TEXEL1 path when the static-off control must exercise its live water composite.'

Assert-True ($renderer -match '(?s)static inline u16 ndsRendererHardwarePackedResolvedColor\(.*?static inline u16 ndsRendererHardwarePackedValidVertexColor\(.*?use_material_color != FALSE.*?use_vertex_color == FALSE.*?RGB15.*?if \(use_vertex_color == FALSE\).*?RGB15\(31u, 31u, 31u\).*?ndsRendererHardwarePackedResolvedColor.*?static u16 ndsRendererHardwarePackedVertexColor\(.*?if \(vertex_color_valid != FALSE\).*?ndsRendererHardwarePackedValidVertexColor.*?color = ndsRendererHardwareLitShadeColor\(stats, vtx, NULL\);.*?ndsRendererHardwarePackedResolvedColor') 'Valid-color helper no longer shares the generic packed-color branches while preserving material-only, white, and invalid-vertex lighting behavior.'

Assert-True ($renderer -match '(?s)ndsRendererNativeStageValidateTopology\(.*?sNdsNativeStageValidationCache\.stamp \^= 1u;.*?gNdsRendererM3TopologyFaultInjectionCount\+\+;.*?sNdsNativeStageValidationCache\.valid = FALSE;.*?ndsRendererNativeStageValidateTopologyFull\(frame, summary\).*?gNdsRendererM3TopologyFullValidationCount\+\+;.*?gNdsRendererM3TopologyFaultRevalidationCount\+\+;') 'M3 topology lab fault no longer invalidates the cached stamp and proves a successful full revalidation before acceptance.'

Assert-True ($renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_DOBJ_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_BINDING_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_TEXTURE_EPOCH_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_MATERIAL_EVENT_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_STATE_SPAN_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_DENSE_VERTEX_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_RUN_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('(u32)run->first_corner + corner_count >') -and $renderer.Contains('NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_CORNER_COUNT')) 'M3 full topology validator no longer covers every generated structure before cache publication.'

-Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_PHASE0=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_PHASE0' -FieldCount 19") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$phase0[12] -eq 1319') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$phase0[13] -eq 651') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$phase0[17] -eq 226') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('attributeExclusive=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0AttributeExclusive)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3Phase0 = @($m3Phase0Samples)')) 'Realtime verifier does not enforce and export the exact M3 Phase-0 timer topology.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_PHASE0=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_PHASE0' -FieldCount 19") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(1639, 811, 16, 420, 334, 146)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(1319, 651, 16, 312, 226, 146)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$phase0[12] -eq $expectedPhase0Counts[0]') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$phase0[17] -eq $expectedPhase0Counts[4]') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('attributeExclusive=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0AttributeExclusive)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3Phase0 = @($m3Phase0Samples)')) 'Realtime verifier does not enforce and export the exact control/generated-shadow M3 Phase-0 timer topology.'

+Assert-True ($rendererHeader.Contains('#define NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE 0') -and $rendererHeader.Contains('NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE must be 0 or 1') -and $renderer -match '(?s)#if NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE &&.*?!NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE.*?ndsRendererNativeStagePrepareGeneratedSegment0[(].*?continue;.*?#endif' -and $renderer -match '(?s)#if NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE &&.*?NDS_RENDERER_M3_PHASE0_PROFILE.*?gNdsRendererM3GeneratedSegment0ShadowFaultInjectedCount[+][+];.*?gNdsRendererM3GeneratedSegment0ShadowFaultRejectedCount[+][+];.*?live_fault_frame\.asset_bases\[1\].*?ndsRendererNativeStageValidateTopologyFull\(\s*&live_fault_frame.*?gNdsRendererM3GeneratedSegment0ShadowLiveFaultRejectedCount[+][+];.*?ndsRendererNativeStageValidateTopologyFull\(\s*frame.*?gNdsRendererM3GeneratedSegment0ShadowLiveFaultRevalidatedCount[+][+];.*?#endif') 'Task 26 selector no longer keeps control default-off, routes production through one generated segment, or confines generation/live fault rejection and revalidation to Phase 0.'

+Assert-True ($relocRendererDL -match '(?s)static sb32 ndsRendererAdapterBuildNativeStageTopologyStamp\(.*?\(uintptr_t\)loaded->data.*?loaded->asset_id.*?loaded->data_size.*?loaded->owner_generation' -and $relocRendererDL -match '(?s)if \(\(workspace->topology_valid != FALSE\).*?ndsRendererAdapterBuildNativeStageTopologyStamp\(.*?topology_stamp != workspace->topology_stamp.*?topology_cached = FALSE;') 'Task 26 live-operand proof no longer pins asset-data pointer invalidation in the adapter topology stamp before cache reuse.'

+Assert-True ($renderer -match '(?s)#if NDS_RENDERER_BENCHMARK_MODE == NDS_RENDERER_BENCHMARK_CPU_PREP_NO_GX\s*if \(segment_index == 0u\).*?ndsRendererBenchmarkSegment0SinkBegin\(\);.*?ndsRendererBenchmarkSegment0SinkEnd\(\);.*?#endif' -and $renderer.Contains('gNdsRendererBenchmarkSinkHashA') -and $renderer.Contains('gNdsRendererBenchmarkSinkHashB') -and $renderer.Contains('gNdsRendererBenchmarkSegment0SinkArmFaults')) 'Task 26 GX-word proof is not bracketed around segment 0 inside the existing CPU_PREP_NO_GX sink.'

+Assert-True ($renderer -match '(?s)ndsRendererCommitNativeStageSegment\(.*?ndsRendererBenchmarkSinkEndOwner\(NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_OWNER_STAGE\);.*?return TRUE;' -and $renderer -match '(?s)ndsRendererFinishNativeStageOwner\(.*?ndsRendererHardwareEndBatch\(\);.*?ndsRendererBenchmarkSinkEndOwner\(NDS_RENDERER_PROFILE_OWNER_STAGE\);' -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sinkOwnerWords -eq $sink[2]') -and -not $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sinkOwnerPartitionValid')) 'Task 26 CPU_PREP_NO_GX commit-time stage writes are not fully owner-attributed and equality-conserved.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('[ValidateRange(0,1)][int]$NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable = 0') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE=$effectiveNativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("'NATIVE_STAGE_GENERATED_SEGMENT0_ENABLE'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable =') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("Join-Path `$task26BuildDirectory 'nds_build_config.h'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('if ($RendererProfileLevel -eq 1)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('gNdsRendererM3GeneratedSegment0AttemptCount$') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('sNdsNativeStageSegment0HotRuns$') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('Built profile-1 ELF generated-segment0 symbols do not match') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('refusing stale -NoBuild evidence')) 'Task 26 selector is not forwarded with its published intrinsic value, build-config identity-checked, or profile-1 symbol-bound for -NoBuild evidence.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_GEN0' -FieldCount 10") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0[5] -eq 26') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0[6] -eq 54') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0[7] -eq 22') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0 =')) 'Task 26 production marker is not parsed, exact-gated, or exported.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0_SHADOW=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_GEN0_SHADOW' -FieldCount 15") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[3] -eq 108') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[8] -eq 733') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[9] -eq 0') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[12] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[13] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow[14] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0Shadow =')) 'Task 26 shadow marker is not parsed, exact-gated, or exporting generation/live pre-GX falsification.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0_GX=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_GEN0_GX' -FieldCount 8") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Gx[1] -eq $sink[2]') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0Gx[7] -eq 0') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0Gx =') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('sink = @($sinkSamples)')) 'Task 26 GX-word marker is not synchronized with the unbounded sink count, balanced, or exported with both hashes.'

+Assert-True ($renderer.Contains('NDS_RENDERER_BENCHMARK_SEGMENT0_TRACE_WORDS 3072u') -and $renderer.Contains('gNdsRendererBenchmarkSegment0Trace') -and $renderer.Contains('ndsRendererBenchmarkSegment0ArmRun') -and $renderer.Contains('ndsRendererBenchmarkSegment0NormalizeAssetAddress') -and $renderer.Contains('gNdsRendererBenchmarkSegment0RunTextureKeyHashA') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0_TRACE_SUMMARY=%u,%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0_TRACE_WORD=%u,%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_GEN0_TRACE_RUN=%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u,%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_GEN0_TRACE_RUN' -FieldCount 12") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0TraceWords.Count -eq') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3GeneratedSegment0TraceRuns.Count -eq 26') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0TraceWords =') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0TraceRuns =')) 'Task 26 exact typed trace no longer exports every segment word with 26 normalized prepared-descriptor run checkpoints.'

+Assert-True ($task26TraceComparator.Contains("[Parameter(Mandatory = `$true)][string]`$Control") -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains("[Parameter(Mandatory = `$true)][string]`$Candidate") -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0TraceWords') -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0TraceRuns') -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains('m3GeneratedSegment0Gx') -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains('Assert-ExactJson') -and $task26TraceComparator.Contains('mismatches=0 arm_faults=0')) 'Task 26 no longer has a standalone selector-0/selector-1 exact typed-trace, normalized-run, and segment-hash comparator.'

+Assert-True ($rendererBenchmarkWrapper.Contains('[ValidateRange(0,1)][int]$NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable = 0') -and $rendererBenchmarkWrapper.Contains('build-task26-segment0-e${NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable}-p$([int]$RendererM3Phase0Profile.IsPresent)-lab') -and $rendererBenchmarkWrapper.Contains('-NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable $NativeStageGeneratedSegment0Enable')) 'Fast renderer wrapper no longer isolates or forwards Task 26 control/candidate and shadow builds.'

Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('M3_PREPARED=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_PREPARED' -FieldCount 15") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3Prepared[2] -gt 0') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('Get-AdjacentHitChangeCounts') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('firstSampleIsOpportunity = $false') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("boundary = 'unknown'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3PreparedOutputCounts = $m3PreparedCounts') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('m3PreparedOutput = @($m3PreparedSamples)')) 'Task 23R verifier no longer exports the honest debugger-only 8-segment/4-material prepared-output stability census.'

Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('G2_STATE=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'G2_STATE' -FieldCount 7") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(41, 13, 138, 0, 54, 32)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 164, 0, 69, 34)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 166, 0, 70, 34)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 166, 0, 70, 36)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$RendererBenchmarkStartEvent -in @('KO','Rebirth')") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$RendererBenchmarkStartFrame -eq 672') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sampleIndex -ge 4') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$RendererBenchmarkStartEvent -eq 'TimeUp'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sampleIndex -ge 6') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$g2State[1..6] -join ','") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('g2State = @($g2StateSamples)')) 'Realtime verifier does not enforce and export the exact phase-specific G2 write/skip census.'
